FREE 15 MINUTE CONSULTATION FOR NEW PATIENTS About Dennis Godby, N.D., M.A. of Sacramento Functional Medicine About Dennis Godby, N.D., M.A. of Sacramento Functional Medicine Dr. Godby is a highly respected naturopathic doctor with 20 years of experience and is the longest-serving naturopathic doctor in the Sacramento area. Known for his dedication to patient care, Dr. Godby creates tailored treatment plans that reflect the unique needs of each individual. His focus is on optimizing health and wellness to enhance overall quality of life, whether through bioidentical hormone replacement therapy, nutritional support, or innovative natural interventions.
